driver_mitaxi.last_page_snippet:
to Settings and tap Delete Account. Confirm 
the action, and your account will be permanently deactivated from MiTaxiApp systems in 
accordance with data policy compliance. 
 
9.4 Language Configurations 
The MiTaxiApp Driver App supports localization. Go to Settings, tap Languages, and select 
your preferred language. The app interface elements and dialog text will automatically load 
the selected translation. 
 
9.5 Referral Program (Invite Friends) 
Under the Invite Friends menu, drivers can share their unique referral code: 
Select share channels: SMS, Email, Facebook, WhatsApp, or Twitter. 
When a new driver downloads the app and signs up using your referral code, both you and 
the new driver receive a referral bonus in your wallet after they successfully complete their 
first trip.

passenger_mitaxi.last_page_snippet:
Password Updates: Securely change account passwords by verifying the old password 
before setting and confirming a new one. 
 
11.2 Account Deactivation & Deletion 
Under privacy settings, passengers can delete their profile: 
Account Deletion Request: Selecting "Delete Account" initiates the account termination 
workflow. 
Verification: The user must enter their account password to confirm the deactivation 
request, preventing accidental or unauthorized deletions. 
 
11.3 Log Out & Session Management 
Logging Out: Tap "Logout" at the bottom of the navigation drawer. 
Session Clearing: Confirming deactivates the user session on the server and clears locally 
cached tokens, returning the user to the Sign In screen.

admin.last_page_snippet:
By clicking on the name of the content, you can view the content inside every topic. 
 
Content can also be edited by clicking on the “Edit” icon in the “Action” column. This option can be used to 
formulate contents furnishing details on the menu with meta title, keywords, and description.  
12.12 Manage City  
This page displays the list of cities and its details including the fare percentage. If you want to change the 
default city, enable the city of your choice and click on the “Update” button in the bottom-right corner to 
save changes.
